title: Environment loading confusion
body: Support notes that .env.example is a reference only. load_settings_from_env() reads the live process environment and does not auto-load a dotenv file.

title: Preflight failure guidance
body: Support escalation guidance says to run python scripts/preflight.py before pushing (or py -3 scripts/preflight.py on Windows) and to update the relevant __ai__.md owner files when governed code or docs change.

title: Starter surface recommendation
body: Builder-facing guidance recommends context_atlas.api for the starter path and examples/starter_context_flow.py as the first example after an editable install.
